name: Lentil Nut Loaf with Red Pepper Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Chop the onion and peppers.
Peel and slice the tomatoes for the loaf.
Peel, seed and chop the tomatoes for the sauce.
1. Place the lentils in a pan and cover with cold water. Bring to the boil, reduce heat and cover and simmer until the lentils are tender. Drain well.
2. Heat the oil in the pan. Add the onion and cook over gentle heat until it is soft. Combine the onion and lentils, ground hazelnuts, tomato puree and basil.
3. Spoon the mixture into a greased and lined 20 x 10cm loaf tin. Cover with the sliced tomatoes, cheese, and breadcrumbs.
4. Bake at 180°C for 30-35 minutes.
5. Prepare the sauce while the loaf is baking. Heat the oil in the pan, add the garlic and cook over a low heat for 2-3 minutes. Add the peppers and tomatoes. Cook until the mixture thickens.
Serve hot or cold with sauce.
